listing.noSessions: No upcoming sessions are available right now.
listing.loadError: Error loading events. Please try again later.

eventDetail.waitlistFull: This session and its waitlist are full.
eventDetail.waitlistNotice: This session is full. Join the waitlist below and we will contact you if a seat opens.
eventDetail.registrationClosed: Registration is closed for this session.

page.title: Cancel registration or leave the waitlist
page.intro: Enter the email you used to sign up. We'll show any active registrations or waitlist spots for that program. Choose a session and we'll email you a link to confirm.

request.linkExpiryHint: We will email you a secure link to confirm. The link is valid until the end of your training session.
request.linkExpiryHintWaitlist: We will email you a secure link to confirm leaving the waitlist. The link is valid until the end of your training session.
request.requestFailed: Something went wrong. Please try again.
request.noRegistrations: We didn't find any active registrations or waitlist spots for this email and program.
request.notRegisteredForSession: No active registration or waitlist spot was found for that session.
request.sessionEnded: This session has already ended and can no longer be changed online.
request.selectSession: Select the registration you want to cancel, then we'll email you a confirmation link.
request.selectSessionWaitlist: Select the waitlist spot you want to leave, then we'll email you a confirmation link.

confirm.invalidLinkBody: This confirmation link is missing or invalid.
confirm.previewIntro: You are about to cancel your registration for:
confirm.waitlistPreviewIntro: You are about to leave the waitlist for:
confirm.successIntro: You are no longer registered for
confirm.waitlistSuccessIntro: You are no longer on the waitlist for
confirm.waitlistAlreadyLeftBody: You were already removed from this waitlist.
confirm.relabelNote: Your registration was marked as cancelled in our system (audit record kept).
confirm.waitlistRelabelNote: Your waitlist spot was marked as unwaitlisted in our system (audit record kept).
confirm.waitlistErrorFallback: Could not confirm leaving the waitlist.

registration.subject: Registration cancelled — {program}: {trainingTitle}
registration.intro: A student cancelled their registration for the session below.

waitlist.subject: Left waitlist — {program}: {trainingTitle}
waitlist.intro: A student left the waitlist for the session below.

success.metadataDescription: Your training signup has been submitted successfully.
success.waitlistMetadataDescription: You have been added to the training waitlist.
success.heading: You're signed up!
success.thankYou: Thank you for registering. Your submission has been received and we'll be in touch with next steps for your training session.
success.waitlistThankYou: Thank you for joining the waitlist. We'll email you if a seat opens for this session.
